title: Lead Product Marketing Engineer - Agentic AI Transformation
company_focus:
Enterprise AI platform for predictive and generative AI
development and governance
description:
Job Description:

DataRobot delivers AI that maximizes impact and minimizes
business risk. Our platform and applications integrate into
core business processes so teams can develop, deliver, and
govern AI at scale. DataRobot empowers practitioners to
deliver predictive and generative AI, and enables leaders to
secure their AI assets. Organizations worldwide rely on
DataRobot for AI that makes sense for their business — today
and in the future.

This is your chance to help define and create a category in
AI. We are looking for a charismatic, creative, and
technical AI Solutions Evangelist to own the public
narrative and inspire the market regarding Agentic AI.

In this role, you will build awareness and inspire AI
initiative leaders—including C-level executives, AI
developers, and operators—to understand how DataRobot is the
best choice to find success quickly. You will translate the
power of our agentic AI platform into a vision that cuts
through the noise and sea of sameness. You will shape public
perceptions and programs that resonate with both AI leaders
(CDOs, CIOs) and hands-on ML practitioners (data scientists,
engineers, AI app developers).

What You’ll Do

You will drive external engagement and act as a primary
thought leader for the company. Your goals and activities
include:

- Lead with Creative Intuition: Go beyond the standard
  playbook. Use your creativity and market intuition to
  identify unique opportunities for DataRobot to drive
  awareness, differentiate our brand, and capture attention
  in a crowded market.
- Evangelize the Agent Platform Story: Be the public voice of
  the DataRobot Agentic AI Platform. Drive outreach
  alongside other industry thought leaders to validate the
  Agentic AI category in live and online events.
- Inspire via Live & Social Channels: Execute a strategy to
  build awareness in diverse media, social forums, and
  communities like Reddit, Hackernews, CIO.com, and even
  Discord servers. Create and share content and engage
  influencers in a way that helps customers see what's
  possible and how to get started, specifically targeting AI
  developers and operators.
- Surface & Share Real-World Success: Uncover and broadcast
  real-world customer success stories that highlight both
  the technical approach/architecture and the transformative
  business impact of Agentic AI. Demonstrate to C-level
  leaders why DataRobot is the best choice for automated
  decision-making and sophisticated reasoning.
- Drive Strategic Partnerships: Work hand-in-hand with
  partners like NVIDIA, SAP, and Dell. Co-host webinars,
  podcasts, and live sessions to craft "better together"
  narratives that resonate with both technical and executive
  buyers.
- Create Magnetic Content: You will write it, build it, and
  launch it. Deliver high-impact assets from live demo flows
  to executive presentations, articles, and videos that
  articulate a compelling product-centric story.

What You Bring

We are looking for a technical evangelist who is passionate
about translating complex agentic AI capabilities into
clear, motivating market narratives.

- Experience: Minimum X years of experience in the data and
  analytics space.
- Creative Strategy: You possess a high degree of intuition
  for where the market is going and the creativity to devise
  new ways to capture attention in those spaces.
- Technical Fluency: Ideally, you have experience with
  enterprise platforms or technical B2B software, with bonus
  points for exposure to LLMs, generative AI, or agent
  frameworks.
- Audience Empathy: Ability to understand AI Leader and ML
  Practitioner needs, specifically around the adoption and
  governance of agentic systems.
- Communication Skills: You love creating unique value
  propositions and presentations. You are comfortable
  speaking boldly and partnering with the best in the
  business.
- Agility: High level of comfort in a startup-like
  environment; you must be able to drive forward, create
  content, and build strategies with minimal guidance.

Why Join Us

- Define the Future: This is your shot to help define the
  Agentic AI category and shape how enterprise teams build
  with intelligence at the core.
- High Visibility: You will be part of a small, scrappy,
  highly visible team. You will work at the intersection of
  technical product depth and creative storytelling.
- Impact: If you've been waiting for a role where you can do
  the best work of your career, in the most exciting space
  in tech, this is it.

Compensation Statement

The U.S. annual compensation range for this full-time
position is between $210,000 and $265,000 USD/year. This
range represents the annual base salary. Actual offers may
be higher or lower than this range based on various factors,
including (but not limited to) the candidate's work
location, job-related skills, experience, and education.

The talent and dedication of our employees are at the core
of DataRobot’s journey to be an iconic company. We strive to
attract and retain the best talent by providing competitive
pay and benefits with our employees’ well-being at the core.
Here’s what your benefits package may include depending on
your location and local legal requirements: Medical, Dental
& Vision Insurance, Flexible Time Off Program, Paid
Holidays, Paid Parental Leave, Global Employee Assistance
Program (EAP) and more!

DataRobot Operating Principles:

- Wow Our Customers
- Set High Standards
- Be Better Than Yesterday
- Be Rigorous
- Assume Positive Intent
- Have the Tough Conversations
- Be Better Together
- Debate, Decide, Commit
- Deliver Results
- Overcommunicate

Research shows that many women only apply to jobs when they
meet 100% of the qualifications while many men apply to jobs
when they meet 60%. At DataRobot we encourage ALL
candidates, especially women, people of color, LGBTQ+
identifying people, differently abled, and other people from
marginalized groups to apply to our jobs, even if you do not
check every box. We’d love to have a conversation with you
and see if you might be a great fit.

DataRobot is proud to be an Equal Employment Opportunity and
Affirmative Action employer. We do not discriminate based
upon race, religion, color, national origin, gender
(including pregnancy, childbirth, or related medical
conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, gender
expression, age, status as a protected veteran, status as an
individual with a disability, or other applicable legally
protected characteristics. DataRobot is committed to working
with and providing reasonable accommodations to applicants
with physical and mental disabilities. Please see the United
States Department of Labor’s EEO poster and EEO poster
supplement for additional information.

All applicant data submitted is handled in accordance with
our Applicant Privacy Policy.
responsibilities: Drive external engagement as a primary thought leader for DataRobot's Agentic AI Platform
Evangelize the Agentic AI platform story at live events, webinars, podcasts, and online forums
Build awareness through diverse media channels including social forums like Reddit, Hackernews, and Discord
Uncover and broadcast real-world customer success stories highlighting technical architecture and business impact
Develop strategic partnerships with NVIDIA, SAP, and Dell to create co-marketing narratives
Create high-impact content including live demo flows, executive presentations, articles, and videos
use_cases: Enterprise agentic AI adoption and governance
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a marketing/evangelism role focused on storytelling,
content creation, and market awareness for DataRobot's
Agentic AI platform. While it requires technical fluency and
understanding of agentic AI systems, the role does not
involve building, training, fine-tuning, or deploying AI
models. Instead, it's about communicating and translating AI
capabilities to the market.
